meta.unit_note: Errors are reported in the same distance unit as the scenario coordinates; thresholds 0.1R and 0.5R correspond to 1.0 and 5.0 when R=10.
meta.target_note: Targets are randomized inside the formation footprint using the deterministic scenario seed so that each run remains reproducible while avoiding a single fixed target layout.
meta.degenerate_note: The degenerate formation places observers on a narrow arc to stress near-singular geometry in addition to circle and random layouts.
